title: Worm-like fossils from ancient China open a strange window into life before animals
description: Fossils in China reveal early life that predates animals and show that ancient ecosystems were more complex than previously thought

title: SCIENCE & TECHNOLOGY: Fossil reveals sea monster that survived injury
description: Scientists have discovered the remains of a giant marine reptile that terrorized the seas over 180 million years ago, based on the fossil of an animal that appears to have lived with multiple injuries. (Story: The Independent)

title: Ancient Tasmanian storage building is now a five-star escape
description: Heritage walks, a wine bar and vast wilderness await - if you can kick off the slippers provided and drag yourself outside.
